profile.name: Thulasi G T
profile.bio:
CSIT student driven by curiosity, creativity, and technology.
Exploring AI, full-stack development, cloud computing, and entrepreneurship.
Building meaningful projects, participating in hackathons, and learning every day.
An artist at heart and an engineer in progress, always seeking new challenges.
Documenting my journey from student to builder, creator, and future entrepreneur.
tags: Thulasi G T > Engineer in Progress • AI Explorer • Creative Artist • Startup Enthusiast

projects.title: KrishiSetu
projects.description: KrishiSetu is a technology-driven agriculture platform developed to support farmers by providing easy access to information, resources, and digital solutions. The project focuses on improving productivity and encouraging sustainable farming practices.
